name: Elkins Lake
description: Elkins Lake is a place to play pickleball in Huntsville, TX. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
fees: Private — Must be landowner in Elkins Lake Subdivision

name: Sam Houston State University
description: Sam Houston State University is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huntsville, TX. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — The courts are a part of Sam Houston State University property. Currently there are no community memberships available at this facility.
